title: Is it possible to get a list of Users that have permission to access a Workspace via api?
excerpt:
I am trying to query to get a list of user_ids who have permission to access a Workspace.  I dont see how this can be done.  I dont see it in the workspace object or users. Is there a way to do it? 
thanks

posts.author: rblackin (Rob Blackin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to query to get a list of user_ids who have permission to access a Workspace. I dont see how this can be done. I dont see it in the workspace object or users. Is there a way to do it?

thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @rblackin and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, there is no way of directly query for the user IDs of the users that can access a specific workspace.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
